creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #19)

I am not a maintainer for any of the ports involved in this bug report and I do not know much about them, but since you ask I am happy to give my opinion: I agree with Mikhail Teterin, using an existing llvm port as dependency rather than a bundled version would be much better. But if it has not been done until now, there must be a reason. I have no idea which one is it.
